findings.what: console.log in production job code
findings.why: Use logger, not console. Job output should go through structured logging.
findings.fix_direction: Replace console.log with logger from the job's build input

findings.what: console.log in production event handler
findings.why: Use logger, not console.
findings.fix_direction: Replace with logger from build input

findings.what: console.error in production hook
findings.why: Use logger or silent handling. Console.error leaks to browser devtools.
findings.fix_direction: Remove or replace with proper error handler/reporter

findings.what: catchUntagged(e) without throw prefix
findings.why: Every other call site uses throw catchUntagged(e). Functionally safe (returns never), but inconsistent — looks like silent swallowing to readers.
findings.fix_direction: Add throw prefix: throw catchUntagged(e)

findings.what: catchUntagged(e) without throw prefix in traced handler wrapper
findings.why: Same as F004 — inconsistency with the rest of the codebase.
findings.fix_direction: Add throw prefix: throw catchUntagged(e)

findings.what: Guest session cookie set client-side with no HMAC/signature — tamperable
findings.why: Cross-user attribution manipulation possible
findings.fix_direction: Create session server-side, sign with GUEST_SESSION_SALT, set HttpOnly+SameSite

findings.what: portal.id reference in useEffect out of scope — guest scans broken
findings.why: Variable destructured AFTER useEffect, should be data.portal.id
findings.fix_direction: Change portal.id to data.portal.id inside useEffect

findings.what: clock.ts documented but does not exist
findings.why: Spec lies about test determinism strategy
findings.fix_direction: Create clock.ts or remove from CONTEXT.md

findings.what: 5+ files import directly from neverthrow instead of shared barrel
findings.why: Undermines shared barrel indirection
findings.fix_direction: Replace from 'neverthrow' with from '#/shared/domain'

findings.what: HTTP status codes in shared/auth/ but imported by 13+ non-auth files
findings.why: Coupling all contexts to shared/auth for non-auth concerns
findings.fix_direction: Move to src/shared/http/status.ts

findings.what: Tenant cache keyed by raw cookie header — memory amplification + collision
findings.why: Large cookie headers amplify memory, cookie changes cause cache misses
findings.fix_direction: Key by session cookie value only

findings.what: Flat useCases spread risks silent name collision between contexts
findings.why: If two contexts export same-named use case, later silently overwrites
findings.fix_direction: Namespace or add collision assertion

findings.what: error-status.ts, pubsub-jwt.verifier.ts, auth-cli.ts not in CONTEXT.md
findings.why: Spec drift
findings.fix_direction: Add missing files to CONTEXT.md auth section

findings.what: Webhook imports from infrastructure/handlers/ not documented in CONTEXT.md
findings.why: Spec only allows server/ imports for routes
findings.fix_direction: Update CONTEXT.md webhook exception to allow infrastructure/handlers/

findings.what: Module-level mutable _lookup — test isolation risk
findings.why: Stale permission data between tests if one fails mid-way
findings.fix_direction: Add resetPermissionLookup() for test teardown

findings.what: resetPasswordEmailHtml generates structurally broken HTML
findings.why: Unclosed/mismatched div tags
findings.fix_direction: Fix emailShell to properly close div.body/div.container

findings.what: deleteProperty passed as raw server fn reference, not wrapped in useMutationAction
findings.why: Violates documented pattern in CONTEXT.md
findings.fix_direction: Wrap in useMutationAction in route file

findings.what: Soft-deleted portals served to guests — findPublicPortalBySlug missing deleted_at IS NULL
findings.why: Deleted portals accessible via public slug route
findings.fix_direction: Add deleted_at IS NULL filter to portal query

findings.what: Smart routing threshold: spec says 1-5, code enforces 1-4
findings.why: Spec/code mismatch — could be functional bug
findings.fix_direction: Align code and spec

findings.what: 6 use cases have zero test coverage (request-upload, finalize-upload, get-portal-qr, get-portal, list-portals, list-portal-groups)
findings.why: Untested code is untrusted code
findings.fix_direction: Add test files for all 6

findings.what: validateUrl allows javascript: and data: schemes
findings.why: XSS risk if use case bypassed
findings.fix_direction: Require https: scheme in domain constructor

findings.what: portal-group repo, mapper, link-resolver, s3 adapter, process-image job have zero tests
findings.why: Recently modified code with no test coverage
findings.fix_direction: Add integration tests

findings.what: Upload handlers swallow errors without catchUntagged
findings.why: S3 errors become opaque 'Upload request failed' messages
findings.fix_direction: Use throw catchUntagged(e) after portalError branch

findings.what: Missing portalGroupToRow mapper — repo does mapping inline
findings.why: Violates mapper pattern, other mappers have FromRow+ToRow pairs
findings.fix_direction: Add portalGroupToRow to mapper

findings.what: incrementProgress lacks tenant isolation — no orgId filter
findings.why: Cross-tenant progress manipulation theoretically possible
findings.fix_direction: Add orgId parameter, JOIN on goals table to verify ownership

findings.what: findAllActive queries ALL tenants with no safeguard preventing request-scoped use
findings.why: If called from server fn, returns cross-tenant data
findings.fix_direction: Rename to findAllActiveForAllTenants() or add branded type guard

findings.what: on-group-deleted handler has zero test coverage
findings.why: Destructive operation (cancels goals) untested
findings.fix_direction: Add on-group-deleted.test.ts

findings.what: No integration test for goal repository — zero tenant isolation test coverage
findings.why: 20+ repo methods untested against real DB
findings.fix_direction: Add goal.repository.test.ts with integration tests

findings.what: incrementProgress is dead code — only upsertProgress is called
findings.why: 85 lines of dead SQL + stubs in every test file
findings.fix_direction: Remove from port and repo

findings.what: cancel-goal emits no domain event
findings.why: Other contexts can't react to cancellations
findings.fix_direction: Add goal.cancelled event or document why intentionally event-free

findings.what: InboxNote create() trusts note.organizationId without explicit orgId param
findings.why: Defense-in-depth gap — other repos require explicit orgId
findings.fix_direction: Add orgId param and verify match

findings.what: Raw sql template for rating filters instead of Drizzle gte/lte operators
findings.why: Bypasses type-safe query builder
findings.fix_direction: Use gte()/lte() from drizzle-orm

findings.what: Missing unbrand() on ReviewId in on-reply-published, inconsistent with on-review-updated
findings.why: Style inconsistency
findings.fix_direction: Add unbrand(event.reviewId)

findings.what: inboxItemStatusChanged event missing propertyId field
findings.why: Downstream handlers may expect propertyId
findings.fix_direction: Add propertyId to event payload

findings.what: 6 of 7 reply mutation server functions skip can() permission gate
findings.why: Inconsistent with getReplyFn and architecture pattern authorize-validate-execute
findings.fix_direction: Add can(ctx.role, 'reply.manage') to all mutation server functions

findings.what: findAllExpiringBefore/findAllExpiredBefore are cross-tenant with no type guard
findings.why: Returns full domain objects from all orgs — fragile
findings.fix_direction: Add SECURITY comment, consider stripped return type

findings.what: deleteReply only allows draft status — rejected replies must be edited-then-deleted
findings.why: Inconsistent UX
findings.fix_direction: Allow deleting rejected replies or document as intentional

findings.what: Staff recent activity pulls 500 rows then sorts in JS to take 5
findings.why: Wasteful at scale
findings.fix_direction: Add findRecentByPropertyId with ORDER BY LIMIT at DB level

findings.what: syncReviews bypasses buildReview constructor, skips rating validation for GBP data
findings.why: Rating 0 or 6 from Google adapter stored without validation
findings.fix_direction: Add assertion for rating range before upsert

findings.what: Unsafe type assertions for platform and rating in mapper
findings.why: Bypasses compile-time safety at boundary
findings.fix_direction: Add runtime validation

findings.what: Cross-tenant findAllExpiredBefore + deleteById — fragile if deleteById signature changes
findings.why: Safety net depends on a single parameter
findings.fix_direction: Add comment documenting cross-tenant-by-design

findings.what: 5 identity server functions (inviteMember, resend, updateRole, remove, listInvitations) skip can() gate
findings.why: Defense-in-depth failure — other identity endpoints have can() checks
findings.fix_direction: Add can() checks to all 5 server functions

findings.what: changePassword, updateProfile, updateUserImage, createOrganization skip requireAuth()
findings.why: Auth bypass risk — endpoints only call getAuth() without enforcing auth
findings.fix_direction: Add await requireAuth(headers) to all 4 endpoints

findings.what: organizations.ts is 734-line god file with 15+ server functions
findings.why: Single-responsibility violation, merge conflict magnet
findings.fix_direction: Split into organizations/members/invitations/auth/uploads

findings.what: createOrganization has no permission check or rate limiting
findings.why: Any authenticated user can create unlimited organizations
findings.fix_direction: Add rate limiting or document intentional open access

findings.what: Domain events (memberInvited, memberRemoved, etc.) defined but never emitted
findings.why: Dead events — cross-context handlers can't react to member changes
findings.fix_direction: Wire events into use cases/server functions or remove from domain

findings.what: Import at line 567 — all other imports at top of file
findings.why: Maintenance hazard
findings.fix_direction: Move import to top

findings.what: Suspicious rawMembers fallback: (result?.members ?? result ?? []) as AuthMemberResponse[]
findings.why: Type assertion hides potential runtime bug
findings.fix_direction: Add explicit Array.isArray check

findings.what: auth-settings.ts uses raw error codes not in IdentityErrorCode union
findings.why: Bypasses tagged error system and exhaustive matching
findings.fix_direction: Extend IdentityErrorCode or document intentional bypass

findings.what: identity.port.better-auth.ts is a tiny re-export file — possibly dead code
findings.why: May be unused if types imported directly from better-auth
findings.fix_direction: Verify usage, remove if unused

findings.what: Duplicated trend() function across 2 files
findings.why: Drift risk
findings.fix_direction: Extract to shared domain/trend.ts

findings.what: Duplicated timeRangeToDates() and makeDashboardError across 3 server files
findings.why: Any fix requires editing 3 files
findings.fix_direction: Extract to shared server/dashboard-utils.ts

findings.what: 6 parallel SQL aggregation queries per request with no caching
findings.why: DB hammer at scale
findings.fix_direction: Add in-memory TTL cache at repo level

findings.what: getKPIsForPortals does property-level review stats, not portal-scoped — data leakage to staff
findings.why: Staff sees review KPIs from all portals, not just assigned ones
findings.fix_direction: Add portal-scoped review stats method

findings.what: reviewWhere() may not filter soft-deleted reviews
findings.why: Stale KPIs if reviews have soft-delete
findings.fix_direction: Add isNull(reviews.deletedAt) if applicable

findings.what: listStaffPortals directly accesses portalRepo — cross-context boundary violation
findings.why: Couples staff to portal repository internals
findings.fix_direction: Extract to PortalLookupPort or composition root function

findings.what: updateStaffPortals validates portals against portalRepo — same boundary violation
findings.why: Same cross-context coupling
findings.fix_direction: Move portal validation to use case via port

findings.what: Portal validation runs BEFORE try/catch — unhandled error bubbling
findings.why: If listByProperty throws, it's not caught by catchUntagged
findings.fix_direction: Move validation inside try block

findings.what: updateStaffPortals idGen returns raw string instead of branded StaffAssignmentId
findings.why: Type mismatch — should wrap with staffAssignmentId()
findings.fix_direction: Wrap with staffAssignmentId(randomUUID())

findings.what: importProperty bypasses buildProperty smart constructor — no validation
findings.why: Domain invariants (name, slug, timezone) can be violated on import
findings.fix_direction: Use buildProperty().match() in importProperty

findings.what: findByGbpPlaceId is cross-org by design — leaks org membership via gbpPlaceId
findings.why: If webhook auth bypassed, attacker can enumerate properties
findings.fix_direction: Add code-level guard or restrict caller identity

findings.what: 9 of 10 public API methods untested at build level — importProperty especially risky
findings.why: Untested wiring
findings.fix_direction: Add tests for importProperty, clearGoogleConnectionRef, findByGbpPlaceId

findings.what: PropertyCreated event has optional GBP fields never populated by createProperty
findings.why: Downstream consumers don't get gbpPlaceId in event
findings.fix_direction: Include optional fields from property in event payload

findings.what: recordScan bypasses domain constructor — raw object spread, no buildScanEvent
findings.why: Every other entity uses buildX constructor, scans skip validation
findings.fix_direction: Add buildScanEvent constructor and use it

findings.what: Guest session ID generated but never sent back as cookie — broken session for first-time visitors
findings.why: Multiple ratings possible from same guest
findings.fix_direction: Set Set-Cookie header for newly generated sessions

findings.what: Duplicate ScanSource type definition
findings.why: Two sources of truth for same type
findings.fix_direction: Import from domain/types.ts

findings.what: teamLeadId cast from string without branded ID constructor
findings.why: Bypasses branded ID system
findings.fix_direction: Use userId(input.teamLeadId) constructor

findings.what: TeamPublicApi is empty type — exported but has no methods
findings.why: Dead code that misleads consumers
findings.fix_direction: Remove or document as placeholder

findings.what: getTeam use case exists but has no server function — unreachable via HTTP
findings.why: Dead use case wiring
findings.fix_direction: Add getTeam server function to teams.ts

findings.what: propertyId as string instead of unbrand() in team repo
findings.why: Inconsistent with unbrand convention
findings.fix_direction: Replace with unbrand(propertyId)

findings.what: Metric repo doesn't use unbrand() for branded IDs in inserts
findings.why: Inconsistent — other repos all unbrand
findings.fix_direction: Add unbrand() calls for all branded IDs in insertReading

findings.what: findByOrganizationId and queryAggregate don't unbrand() IDs in WHERE
findings.why: Same as F071 — consistency
findings.fix_direction: Add unbrand() calls

findings.what: BUILT_IN_METRIC_KEYS duplicates MetricKey type — 3 places to maintain same list
findings.why: Drift risk
findings.fix_direction: Derive from single source of truth

findings.what: createMetricReading doesn't validate metricKey against known keys
findings.why: Domain should be final enforcement point
findings.fix_direction: Add metric key validation to constructor

findings.what: ActivityError missing _tag field, uses open string code — breaks tagged error convention
findings.why: No isActivityError guard, can't use exhaustive matching
findings.fix_direction: Add _tag, closed union type, isActivityError guard

findings.what: createActivityLog returns id: '' placeholder — invalid domain object
findings.why: Violates domain invariant that entities must have valid IDs
findings.fix_direction: Accept id as input parameter to constructor

findings.what: findByResource doesn't filter by organizationId — potential cross-tenant data leak
findings.why: Resource ID lookup not scoped to tenant
findings.fix_direction: Add organizationId to WHERE clause

findings.what: findDuplicate uses naive JSONB text comparison — key ordering causes false negatives
findings.why: Idempotency check can miss true duplicates
findings.fix_direction: Use Postgres @> containment operator for JSONB equality

findings.what: Reply handlers use resourceType: 'inbox_item' instead of 'reply' per CONTEXT.md
findings.why: Implementation diverges from CONTEXT.md contract
findings.fix_direction: Align handlers with CONTEXT.md or update spec

findings.what: Activity repo uses raw cast instead of unbrand — context doesn't use branded IDs at all
findings.why: No type safety against ID mixups in activity context
findings.fix_direction: Consider using branded IDs or document intentional plain strings

findings.what: tracedHandler missing method and trace name — activity functions won't appear in traces
findings.why: Missing observability
findings.fix_direction: Add method and traceName to tracedHandler calls

findings.what: Role cast from DB without validation — raw (row as Record).role as Role
findings.why: Invalid role values pass through unchecked
findings.fix_direction: Validate against VALID_ROLES set before returning

findings.what: Non-admin pagination does in-memory filtering — approximate pages, potential OOM
findings.why: Performance at scale
findings.fix_direction: Push property filtering into DB WHERE clause

findings.file: Multiple use case files across all contexts
findings.what: Inconsistent error strategy: some use cases return Result, some throw tagged errors
findings.why: No single convention — callers don't know what to expect
findings.fix_direction: Standardize on one approach (throw seems dominant)
